## Spec Impact

- [ ] No spec change required
- [ ] Updates product constitution
- [ ] Updates feature requirements
- [ ] Updates eval scenarios or expected evidence

Governing requirement IDs:

-

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets`
- [ ] Eval harness command or scenario, when applicable:

## Public Safety

- [ ] No secrets, local paths, private planning notes, or personal workflow files
- [ ] No generated runtime reports committed outside intentional fixtures
- [ ] README/user-facing docs are written from a user perspective, when changed

## Residual Risk

-
